title: thuranthos polyphyllus
intro: Thuranthos polyphyllus, also known as the Polypodium leucotomos fern or simply 'Polypodium leucotomos', is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Thuranthos polyphyllus has been used to treat various health conditions, such as skin disorders, liver diseases, and some types of cancer, thanks to its ability to protect cells from oxidative damage and promote cell regeneration. It is often prepared as a topical cream, oral supplement, or infused in teas and tinctures to harness its health benefits.
